ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the problem (e.g., algorithm, data structures) */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of users who have attempted the problem */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the problem on the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags for the problem (e.g., array, linked list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the solution */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the submission (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Submitted code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similar_problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "similar_problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of a similar problem */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two problems */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id", "similar_problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_sets" (
  "problem_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem set */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of a problem in the set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_set_id", "problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_sets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress made by the user (e.g., 0.5 for 50%) */,
  "last_attempted" TEXT /* Date when the user last attempted the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user progress was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user progress was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user for the problem */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the user for the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id", "user_id")
)
